note: Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold/VectorBundle/CovariantDerivative/Basic.lean:365 — structure CovariantDerivative on a vector bundle over a manifold; docstring states 'covariant derivatives (aka Koszul connections) on vector bundles over manifolds', matching the concept directly.

Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/RootSystem/CartanMatrix.lean:120 — the Cartan matrix of a crystallographic root pairing encodes the same combinatorial data as its Dynkin diagram (file explicitly discusses 'connectedness of the Dynkin diagram' at line 228-229), but Mathlib formalizes the matrix, not a diagram/graph object, so this is a nearby encoding rather than the concept itself.

Mathlib/Analysis/LocallyConvex/Montel.lean:41 — class MontelSpace (Heine-Borel property: closed+bounded implies compact) generalizes the property that classical Montel's theorem establishes for spaces of holomorphic functions; Mathlib proves the abstract TVS class but has no instance/theorem that spaces of holomorphic functions satisfy it (no 'normal family' result found), so this is the generalized structure, not the classical theorem itself.
